productDisplayName: Baggit Women Valley Hoor Green Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This three-fold timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 19 cm x 9.5 cm Crafted from genuine leather and fabric has a flap style three-fold opening with press button closures A buckle detail on the front Six card holders, two pockets, a key holder and an id holder on the left fold Four card holders on the centre fold A zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
